title: Symonic Deck publishing rail
decision_horizon: Before the next private packet release
next_action: Run the workflow and inspect the generated guide artifact.
signal: The design guide, reporting template, schema, and renderer are now in one launcher repository.

proof.statement: The launcher contains an editable ReportLab guide generator.
SPLAT reporting has a Markdown scaffold and a Draft 2020-12 schema.

known_limits: The guide renderer is a documentation generator, not a claim-verification engine.
Purple and pale yellow do not encode evidence status.
limit.counterpoint: A structured report can still be wrong if its cited receipts are weak or misinterpreted.
not_established: This does not establish that every future report should use the same perspective mode.
This does not validate the factual content of a report.

action.next_step: Review the draft PR and let GitHub Actions render the design guide artifact.
action.release_gate: Confirm generator output, template metadata, and receipt paths are usable on the local machine.
